_comment: Tier-2 for skfem poisson#: two empirical catalog-drift findings in skfem 12.0.1: (a) get_dofs('left') raises ValueError 'Boundary \'left\' not found' on a freshly constructed mesh — m.with_boundaries({'left': filter}) is required to register the name; (b) to_meshio is NOT removed in v12+, it lives at skfem.io.meshio.to_meshio (just removed from top-level skfem namespace). The catalog text 'For v12+: to_meshio removed — use meshio.Mesh() directly' is misleading. Verified empirically 2026-06-01 (skfem 12.0.1).
